title: Predictive Elastic Scaling
requirements: Dynamic provisioning: Automatically scale shard replicas based on 'Demand-Signals'.
Thresholds: Trigger scaling at >70% CPU/Memory or high transaction volume.
Cost-Efficiency: Automatically decommission idle replicas in low-demand periods.
Compliance: Maintain Law 151 architectural standards during elastic bursts.

logic.analysis: Integrate with Predictive Engine (P-13) for forward-looking demand signals.
logic.execution: Invoke Scaling Orchestrator for rapid shard propagation.
logic.logging: Record all elastic events in the 'Infrastructure-Ledger'.
